---
title: "Demos"
listing:
  type: grid
  contents:
    - demos/wikiguess.qmd
    - demos/game_of_life.qmd
    - demos/relativity.qmd
    - demos/metropolis_hastings.qmd
    - demos/chaos_sampler.qmd
---

Assorted projects I have worked on, generally try to explore a neat idea in an interactive way
